zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas Barsham於1496年出生在英國諾福爾可沃特爾登時，他的父親Thomas Barsham47歲，母親Margaret Cavendish38歲。他於大約1526年與Ann Barsham在英國英格蘭結婚。他去世於1545年享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas Barsham于1496年出生在英国諾福爾可沃特爾登时，他的父亲Thomas Barsham47岁，母亲Margaret Cavendish38岁。他于大约1526年与Ann Barsham在英国英格兰结婚。他去世于1545年享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: Barsham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from North, East, or West Barsham (Norfolk), or from Barsham (Suffolk).

variants.name: Basson
meanings: French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Basso, based on the element bad (from badhuo) ‘battle’.
German: of French (Huguenot) origin (see 2 above). This surname is very rare in Germany. Compare   Posson  .

variants.name: Basham
meanings: English (Norfolk, Suffolk, and Essex): variant of Barsham, a habitational name from any of the places in Norfolk and Suffolk called Barsham, from the genitive case of the Old English byname Bār ‘wild boar’ + Old English hām ‘homestead’.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas Barsham was born in 1496, in Waterden, Norfolk, England, his father, Thomas Barsham, was 47 and his mother, Margaret Cavendish, was 38. He married Ann Barsham about 1526, in England, United Kingdom. He died in 1545, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas Barsham est né en 1496, à Waterden, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Barsham, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Margaret Cavendish, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Ann Barsham environ 1526, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé en 1545, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas Barsham 1496 in Waterden, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Barsham 47 und seine Mutter Margaret Cavendish 38. Er hat um 1526 in England, United Kingdom Ann Barsham geheiratet. Er starb 1545 im Alter von 49 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Barsham è nato il nel 1496 nel Waterden, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Thomas Barsham, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Cavendish, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Ann Barsham circa 1526, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì nel 1545, all'età di 49 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas Barsham(이)가 1496년 영국 노르폴크 왓르든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Barsham(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Cavendish(은)는 38세였다. 그는 대략 1526년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Ann Barsham(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1545년 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Barsham nasceu em 1496, em Waterden, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Barsham, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Cavendish, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Ann Barsham aproximadamente 1526, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 1545, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas Barsham родился в 1496 г. в местности вэитирден, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Barsham было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Cavendish, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Ann Barsham около 1526 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. Он умер в 1545 г. в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas Barsham nació en 1496, en Waterden, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Barsham, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Margaret Cavendish, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Ann Barsham aproximadamente 1526, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió en 1545, a la edad de 49 años.
